mapper.sql: id, user_id, document_id, document_type, document_user_id, collection_stat, read_stat, comment_stat, praise_stat, create_time, update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE user_foot
collection_stat = #{collectionStat},
read_stat = #{readStat},
comment_stat = #{commentStat},
praise_stat = #{praiseStat},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}
